     the Fermi energy is     0.4366 ev

!    total energy              =   -6197.34407622 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000002 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.05007850 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -122675.00575224 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   61917.62214714 Ry
